title: Mo' Glowstone Lamps
description: An official addon to Mo' Glowstone, this mod adds colored Glowstone Lamps!
body:
An **official addon** to _[Mo' Glowstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glowstone)_, this mod adds colored Glowstone Lamps! Please ensure you have _[CTD Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctd-core)_ and _[Mo' Glowstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glowstone)_ installed before playing, or the mod will not work. ;) 

Mo' Glowstone's Glowstone Lamp is basically a lit redstone lamp. We add options to give yourself more color options for that block!

**FAQ:**
*Q: HOW DO I OBTAIN THESE MAJESTIC LIGHTS?* 

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/320/497/310/172/step-one.PNG)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/320/498/310/172/step-two.PNG)

*Q: WHAT MODS DO I NEED TO INSTALL?* 

A: [CTD Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctd-core) and [Mo' Glowstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glowstone) v2.0.6+

*Q: WILL U DO MO' REDSTONE LAMPS?* 

A: Maybe?? ;P


[![Available on Github!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/MasterGeneral156/Mo-Glowstone-Lamps) [![Available on CurseForge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-glowstone-lamps) [![Available on CurseForge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glowstone-lamps)
